capture_method: Source-controlled Slack POC iteration packet based on existing Data Bot snapshot, Slack findings, and approved implementation plan

agent_definition.name: Da Ta Bot
agent_definition.description: StaffAny internal data analyst for BigQuery metrics, Pantheon context, and Slack-thread data questions.
starter_prompts: Inspect fct_daily_attendance and summarize what questions it can answer.
Show active StaffAny staff by organization for last month.
Use this Slack thread and tell me what metric they are asking for.

known_gaps: Reuse the connected StaffAny BigQuery Auth custom MCP app. Expected MCP URL is https://bq-mcp-proxy-1093387803298.asia-southeast1.run.app/mcp with Access token / API key auth, Bearer scheme. Secret value lives in Secret Manager secret bq-mcp-proxy-shared-secret in project staffany-warehouse. Do not store the token in this repo.
Built-in Slack is the v1 path for forwarded thread text and image context; add a custom Slack MCP only if preview tests show Slack context is unreliable after this POC pass.
Do not publish to PS/RevOps, org directory, schedules, or broader Slack channels until the regression tests pass.
